text:
/ci1 2 動きの素早そうな相手だね……
背後が苦手そうだから
なんとか回り込みたいところだけど……

/ci1 2 It's so nimble! But judging by the way
it moves, it probably can't cover its back,
so I'd advise circling around it if you can.

動きの素早そうな相手だね……
背後が苦手そうだから
なんとか回り込みたいところだけど……

It's so nimble! But judging by the way it moves,
it probably can't cover its back, so I'd advise
circling around it if you can.
